text.title: process-mining-automation Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for process-mining-automation as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Automating a high-volume process before checking for standardization — discovering mid-project that 40% of cases are exceptions.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Volume alone is not a sufficient criterion. A 1,000-transaction/day process with 50% exceptions requires human judgment more than automation; scoring all six criteria prevents this failure.

failure-mode.description: Selecting automation vendor before completing the process assessment — vendor locks in architecture before requirements are known.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Complete the assessment matrix and determine whether RPA or intelligent automation applies before engaging vendors; the tool selection follows from the process characteristics, not from the vendor relationship.
